verdict: This dry oil spray delivers lightweight, fast-absorbing oils suitable for body hydration without greasy residue. However, the formula relies heavily on silicones and fragrance, which may limit appeal for minimalist skincare seekers.

_research.name: Aveeno Pure Renewal Dry Body Oil Spray
pros: Non-greasy spray application with quick absorption
Blend of nourishing plant oils including jojoba
Pleasant fragrance appeals to mass market
_research.con: High silicone content and synthetic fragrance reduce suitability for sensitive or naturalist-focused consumers.
